title: desmodium australe
intro: Desmodium australe, also known as Stick-tight or Hop Clover, is a perennial legume native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Desmodium australe has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
